item.title: Rating module info box is incorrect.
item.content:encoded: The infobox on the rating module was copied from 5089 and not updated, so it still has 5089's title and info. Great SCP otherwise.

item.title: Re: Nice SCP!
item.content:encoded:
If you would like to use the formats included in this article, you can click "+ Options" at the bottom of the page and then click "Page Source". Then, scroll down to the code you want to use and copy/paste as you please.

More specifically, if you're wondering about the bar at the top of the screen, that's the Anomaly Classification System, the details of which are explained here.

item.title: Nice SCP!
item.content:encoded: Hey there, I liked this SCP a lot! I like how it kind of mocks recent events and such while not being blatantly obvious. I'm not really an expert at anything but I hope other people feel the same. Can you tell me where the format is from, though? Kinda new to this place, so that'd be a great help for my future projects

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
Finally got this one out!

Image is from Wikimedia Commons.

Huge thanks to all the people who reviewed! I can't remember the specifics, but I do know they're mostly IRC frequenters, and they're awesome!

Lastly, thank you for reading!
